full_text:
Wang Mo 王摩
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wang Mo (王摩). Commanded a detached camp on the Yellow River but it was destroyed in a raid and he surrendered. Wang Mo was affiliated with Yuan Shao and the Wei Kingdom.
